nasb.text: The Lord will give strength to His people; The Lord will bless His people with peace.

esv.text: May the Lord give strength to his people! May the Lord bless his people with peace!

cnv.text: 願耶和華賜力量給他的子民， 願耶和華賜平安的福給他的子民。

ccb.text: 耶和华赐力量给自己的子民， 赐给他们平安的福乐。

csbs.text: 耶和华赐力量给他的子民， 耶和华以平安祝福他的子民。
